[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000010 2
1 100100000 2
2 000000100 1
3 111001000 4
4 101101011 6
5 111111111 a
6 001010000 2
7 110111011 7
